role: SDET, Automation Test Engineer, Web Developer
aboutMe:
A Filipino working in IT, residing in Melbourne AU.


I currently work as a Software Developer in Test / Consultant for Planit Testing.


I have over 12 years of experience in Software Development, and over 6 years in Automated UI Testing.


I do music for fun. I am the vocalist and one of the composers/producers for the band Tito Science


I do cycling, running, and jiujitsu.
